descriptionEn: Name means "gift." He is the son of Levi and father of Jorim, a Judahite, listed in Luke's genealogy of Christ. There is another Matthat who is also the son of another Levi listed later as father of Heli.

verses.line: Which was the son of Jose, which was the son of Eliezer, which was the son of Jorim, which was the son of Matthat, which was the son of Levi,
